'''白鳥塚古墳'''は、日本の古墳の名称。
*[[白鳥塚古墳 (名古屋市)]] - 名古屋市守山区上志段味（国[[史跡]]） *[[白鳥塚古墳 (鈴鹿市)]] - 三重県鈴鹿市加佐登町・石薬師町 *[[白鳥塚古墳 (宝塚市)]] - 兵庫県宝塚市中山寺
:各地の[[白鳥古墳]]については左記の項目を参照。
[[Category:日本の古墳|しらとりつかこふん]] {{aimai}}

'''白鳥塚古墳'''（しらとりづかこふん、はくちょうづかこふん）は、日本の古墳の名称。
* [[白鳥塚古墳 (名古屋市)]] - 名古屋市守山区上志段味（国[[史跡]]）。しらとりづかこふん。 * [[白鳥塚古墳 (鈴鹿市)]] - 三重県鈴鹿市加佐登町・石薬師町。しらとりづかこふん。 * [[白鳥塚古墳 (宝塚市)]] - 兵庫県宝塚市中山寺。はくちょうづかこふん。
== 関連項目 == * [[白鳥古墳]]
{{aimai}} [[Category:日本の古墳|しらとりつかこふん]]

revision.text:
'''Shiratori Tumulus''' (白鳥塚古墳, Shiratori-zuka Kofun or Hakuchō-zuka Kofun) is the name of various tumuli in Japan.
* [[Shiratori Tumulus (Nagoya)]] - Located in Kamishidami, [[Moriyama-ku, Nagoya]], [[Aichi Prefecture]] (designated as a [[Historic Site]] of Japan) (Shiratori-zuka Kofun). * [[Shiratori Tumulus (Suzuka)]] - Located in Kasado-chō and Ishiyakushi-chō, [[Suzuka]], [[Mie Prefecture]] (Shiratori-zuka Kofun). * [[Shiratori Tumulus (Takarazuka)]] - Located in [[Nakayama-dera]], [[Takarazuka]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] (Hakuchō-zuka Kofun).
== Related Articles == * [[Shiratori Tumulus (disambiguation)]]
{{Disambiguation}} [[Category:Ancient Japanese tumuli]] [[ja:白鳥塚古墳]]

'''Shiratori Tumulus''' (白鳥塚古墳, Shiratori-zuka Kofun or Hakuchō-zuka Kofun) is the name of various tumuli in Japan.
* [[Shiratori Tumulus (Nagoya)]] - Located in Kamishidami, [[Moriyama-ku, Nagoya]], [[Aichi Prefecture]] (designated as a [[Historic Site]] of Japan) (Shiratori-zuka Kofun). * [[Shiratori Tumulus (Suzuka)]] - Located in Kasado-chō and Ishiyakushi-chō, [[Suzuka]], [[Mie Prefecture]] (Shiratori-zuka Kofun). * [[Shiratori Tumulus (Takarazuka)]] - Located in [[Nakayama-dera]], [[Takarazuka]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] (Hakuchō-zuka Kofun).
== Related Articles == * [[Shiratori Tumulus (disambiguation)]]
{{Disambiguation}} [[Category:Ancient Japanese tumuli]] [[category:new pages]][[ja:白鳥塚古墳]]

'''Shiratori Tumulus''' (白鳥塚古墳, Shiratori-zuka Kofun or Hakuchō-zuka Kofun) is the name of various tumuli in Japan.
* [[Shiratori Tumulus (Nagoya)]] - Located in Kamishidami, [[Moriyama-ku, Nagoya]], [[Aichi Prefecture]] (designated as a [[Historic Site]] of Japan) (Shiratori-zuka Kofun). * [[Shiratori Tumulus (Suzuka)]] - Located in Kasado-chō and Ishiyakushi-chō, [[Suzuka]], [[Mie Prefecture]] (Shiratori-zuka Kofun). * [[Shiratori Tumulus (Takarazuka)]] - Located in [[Nakayama-dera]], [[Takarazuka]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] (Hakuchō-zuka Kofun).
== Related Articles == * [[Shiratori Tumulus (disambiguation)]]
{{Disambiguation}} [[Category:Ancient Japanese tumuli]] [[category:new pages]][[category:new pages]][[ja:白鳥塚古墳]]

'''Shiratori Tumulus''' (白鳥塚古墳, Shiratori-zuka Kofun or Hakuchō-zuka Kofun) is the name of various tumuli in Japan.
* [[Shiratori Tumulus (Nagoya)]] - Located in Kamishidami, [[Moriyama-ku, Nagoya]], [[Aichi Prefecture]] (designated as a [[Historic Site]] of Japan) (Shiratori-zuka Kofun). * [[Shiratori Tumulus (Suzuka)]] - Located in Kasado-chō and Ishiyakushi-chō, [[Suzuka]], [[Mie Prefecture]] (Shiratori-zuka Kofun). * [[Shiratori Tumulus (Takarazuka)]] - Located in [[Nakayama-dera]], [[Takarazuka]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] (Hakuchō-zuka Kofun).
== Related Articles == * [[Shiratori Tumulus (disambiguation)]]
{{Disambiguation}} [[Category:Ancient Japanese tumuli]] [[category:new pages]][[category:new pages]][[category:new pages]][[ja:白鳥塚古墳]]

'''Shiratorizuka Kofun''' (白鳥塚古墳, also pronounced Hakuchōzuka Kofun) is the name of several kofun in Japan.
* {{ill|Shiratorizuka Kofun (Nagoya)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (名古屋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|守山区}}, {{ill|Nagoya|ja|名古屋市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}, this kofun is a designated National Historic Site. (Shiratorizuka Kofun) * {{ill|Shiratorizuka Kofun (Suzuka)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (鈴鹿市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kasadochō|ja|加佐登町}} and {{ill|Ishiyakushichō|ja|石薬師町}}, {{ill|Suzuka|ja|鈴鹿市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}. (Shiratorizuka Kofun) * {{ill|Shiratorizuka Kofun (Takarazuka)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (宝塚市)}} - Located in {{ill|Nakayamadera (Takarazuka)|ja|中山寺 (宝塚市の地名)}}, {{ill|Takarazuka|ja|宝塚市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}. (Hakuchōzuka Kofun)

* {{ill|Shiratorizuka Kofun (Nagoya)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (名古屋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|守山区}}, {{ill|Nagoya|ja|名古屋市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}, this kofun is a designated National Historic Site. (Shiratorizuka Kofun) * {{ill|Shiratorizuka Kofun (Suzuka)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (鈴鹿市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kasadochō|ja|加佐登町}} and {{ill|Ishiyakushichō|ja|石薬師町}}, {{ill|Suzuka|ja|鈴鹿市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}. (Shiratorizuka Kofun) * {{ill|Shiratorizuka Kofun (Takarazuka)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (宝塚市)}} - Located in {{ill|Nakayamadera (Takarazuka)|ja|中山寺 (宝塚市の地名)}}, {{ill|Takarazuka|ja|宝塚市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}. (Hakuchōzuka Kofun)

revision.text:
'''白鳥塚古墳'''（しらとりづかこふん、はくちょうづかこふん）は、日本の古墳の名称。
* [[白鳥塚古墳 (名古屋市)]] - 愛知県名古屋市[[守山区]][[上志段味]]（国の[[史跡]]）（しらとりづかこふん） * [[白鳥塚古墳 (鈴鹿市)]] - 三重県鈴鹿市[[加佐登町]]・[[石薬師町]]（しらとりづかこふん） * [[白鳥塚古墳 (宝塚市)]] - 兵庫県宝塚市[[中山寺 (宝塚市の地名)|中山寺]]（はくちょうづかこふん）
== 関連項目 == * [[白鳥古墳 (曖昧さ回避)]]
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:しらとりつかこふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[白鳥塚古墳]] to [[Shiratorizuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:白鳥塚古墳]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11580551]]
Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:26, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Shiratorizuka Kofun''' (白鳥塚古墳, also pronounced Hakuchōzuka Kofun) is the name of several kofun in Japan.

* {{ill|Shiratorizuka Kofun (Nagoya)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (名古屋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiratorizuka Kofun (Nagoya)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya]], [[:en:Nagoya|Nagoya]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]], this kofun is a designated National Historic Site. (Shiratorizuka Kofun)
* {{ill|Shiratorizuka Kofun (Suzuka)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (鈴鹿市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiratorizuka Kofun (Suzuka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kasadochō|ja|加佐登町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasadochō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Ishiyakushichō|ja|石薬師町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishiyakushichō|qq=|1=Ishiyakushichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119380018}}, [[:en:Suzuka, Mie|Suzuka]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]. (Shiratorizuka Kofun)
* {{ill|Shiratorizuka Kofun (Takarazuka)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (宝塚市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiratorizuka Kofun (Takarazuka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nakayamadera (Takarazuka)|ja|中山寺 (宝塚市の地名)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayamadera (Takarazuka)|qq=|1=Nakayamadera|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104621308}}, [[:en:Takarazuka, Hyōgo|Takarazuka]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. (Hakuchōzuka Kofun)

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:白鳥塚古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:白鳥塚古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:白鳥塚古墳]]
'''Shiratorizuka Kofun''' (白鳥塚古墳, also pronounced Hakuchōzuka Kofun) is the name of several kofun in Japan.
* {{ill|Shiratorizuka Kofun (Nagoya)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (名古屋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiratorizuka Kofun (Nagoya)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|WD=Q1155291|lt=Moriyama-ku, Nagoya}}, {{ill|Nagoya|en|Nagoya|WD=Q11751|lt=Nagoya}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}, this kofun is a designated National Historic Site. (Shiratorizuka Kofun) * {{ill|Shiratorizuka Kofun (Suzuka)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (鈴鹿市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiratorizuka Kofun (Suzuka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kasadochō|ja|加佐登町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasadochō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Ishiyakushichō|ja|石薬師町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishiyakushichō|1=Ishiyakushichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119380018}}, {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|en|Suzuka, Mie|WD=Q207311|lt=Suzuka}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture}}. (Shiratorizuka Kofun) * {{ill|Shiratorizuka Kofun (Takarazuka)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (宝塚市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiratorizuka Kofun (Takarazuka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nakayamadera (Takarazuka)|ja|中山寺 (宝塚市の地名)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayamadera (Takarazuka)|1=Nakayamadera|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104621308}}, {{ill|Takarazuka, Hyōgo|en|Takarazuka, Hyōgo|WD=Q823967|lt=Takarazuka}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. (Hakuchōzuka Kofun)
